title: Gold Steadies as Traders Weigh Diplomatic Push to End Iran War
title_cn: 交易员权衡通过外交手段结束伊朗战争，金价持稳
summary: Gold was little changed as traders weighed the latest efforts by the US and Iran to find a negotiated solution to the two-month war that’s choked energy supplies and heightened inflation risks.

title: Goldman Hikes Oil Forecasts Again as Hormuz Shock Builds
title_cn: 随着霍尔木兹地震的加剧，高盛再次上调石油预测
summary: Daan Struyven, Goldman Sachs Co-Head of Global Commodities Research, joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss his team's latest oil outlook. Struyven and his team upgraded Brent to $90/barrel by the fourth quarter, citing lower Persian Gulf production, and ongoing Strait of Hormuz disruption. They now assume a normalization in Gulf exports by the end of June (vs. a prior forecast of mid-May) and see a slower recovery for Gulf production. However, a global recession is not in the team's base case unless the strait remains mostly closed in a "severely adverse" scenario.  Struyven speaks with Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pre-War Playbook Returns as Stock Traders Favor Asia Over US
title_cn: 战前策略回归，股票交易员青睐亚洲而非美国
summary: Investors are reverting to a pre-war playbook of betting Asian stocks will outpace US peers, as confidence builds in the region’s central role in the artificial-intelligence boom.

title: Oil Steadies as US Weighs Iran Proposal With Hormuz Still Shut
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡仍关闭，美国权衡伊朗提案，油价稳定
summary: Oil held a gain as traders weighed the next steps toward peace talks over the Iran war, with the US discussing a proposal from Tehran while the crucial Strait of Hormuz remained almost impassable.

title: Asian Stocks Look Subdued Ahead of Tech Earnings: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 亚洲股市在科技股财报公布前显得低迷：市场总结
summary: Asian stocks were poised for a soft open Tuesday as investors braced for a wave of earnings from tech giants while keeping a close eye on developments in the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Vietnam Gas Major Looks to US as Iran War Reorders LPG Flows
title_cn: 伊朗战争重新调整液化石油气流量，越南天然气巨头向美国寻求帮助
summary: PetroVietnam Gas JSC plans to import more liquefied petroleum gas from the US than its traditional Middle East suppliers next month, in the latest sign that the Iran war is reordering global energy flows.

title: Spelman's Roz Brewer: Need to Run Colleges Like a Business
title_cn: 斯佩尔曼的罗兹·布鲁尔：需要像企业一样经营大学
summary: Former Cam's Club CEO and Spelman College Interim President Roz Brewer discusses launching a $500 million 'Spelman Forward' campaign aimed at helping students prepare for their future after graduation, and her focus on creating the best eduction for black women in the country. She talks with Romaine Bostick for "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mexico Arrests Cartel Boss With $5 Million US Bounty on His Head
title_cn: 墨西哥逮捕贩毒集团头目 悬赏 500 万美元悬赏追捕他
summary: Mexico arrested a senior underworld figure with a $5 million bounty on his head who was sought for crimes including drug trafficking and defrauding US pensioners.

title: American Airlines Sells $1.14 Billion in Bonds for 32 Planes
title_cn: 美国航空出售价值 11.4 亿美元的 32 架飞机债券
summary: American Airlines Group Inc. on Monday sold $1.14 billion of bonds financing a group of planes.

title: Intel $6.5 Billion Bond Sale Signals Investor Hope in Turnaround
title_cn: 英特尔 65 亿美元债券发售标志着投资者对扭亏为盈的希望
summary: Intel Corp. has been suffering from credit rating downgrades in recent years as its profits deteriorated, but on Monday bond investors signaled they are buying into the company’s turnaround story.

title: LifeMD Bone Longevity Lead on Osteoporosis Treatment, Prevention
title_cn: LifeMD 骨长寿在骨质疏松症治疗和预防方面处于领先地位
summary: Dr. Doug Lucas, LifeMD Orthopedic Surgeon and Bone Health & Longevity Clinical Lead, joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss bone health for men and women, diagnosing and treating osteoporosis, how to prevent bone health issues from beginning and compounding, and more. He speaks with Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Stock Market’s 'Curious Exuberance' Despite the Iran War
title_cn: 尽管伊朗战争，股市仍呈现“奇怪的繁荣”
summary: On today’s Big Take podcast, Asia equities reporter Winnie Hsu and markets reporter Ruth Carson tell host Sarah Holder why global markets are looking past the Iran war — and why that could change. Listen wherever you get your podcasts. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Falls as Traders Weigh Restart of US-Iran Peace Talks
title_cn: 交易商考虑重启美伊和谈，金价下跌
summary: Gold fell as efforts to resume peace talks between the US and Iran remained at an impasse, two months into a war that’s upended global markets and raised inflation risks.

title: Emerging Stocks Reclaim Pre-War Peak on AI, Hormuz Deal Hopes
title_cn: 人工智能、霍尔木兹协议希望新兴股市重拾战前峰值
summary: Emerging-market stocks climbed Monday amid a renewed focus on artificial intelligence companies, even as the stalemate between the US and Iran on resuming peace negotiations left the Strait of Hormuz almost impassable and pushed oil higher.

title: Hut 8 Raises $3.25 Billion to Help Fund Google-Tied Data Center
title_cn: Hut 8 融资 32.5 亿美元，为与 Google 合作的数据中心提供资金
summary: A Hut 8 Corp. project sold $3.25 billion of investment-grade bonds Monday to fund the construction of a data center tied to Alphabet Inc.’s Google, the latest in a string of borrowing by firms spearheading the artificial intelligence boom.

title: Private Credit Boom Pushes Fund Finance Market Past $1 Trillion
title_cn: 私人信贷繁荣推动基金金融市场突破1万亿美元
summary: The fund finance market has surged past $1 trillion, according to a pair of new reports, as money managers borrow more to manage liquidity and bridge delayed exits.

title: Sotheby's US Private Sales Head on $130M Mnuchin Auction
title_cn: 苏富比美国私人销售主管将参与价值 1.3 亿美元的姆努钦拍卖会
summary: Sotheby's Head of Private Sales Courtney Kremers discusses the sale of 'unique' art world figure Robert Mnuchin's $130 million collection, and the shift towards younger buyers in the marketplace. She talks with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifled on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Starboard Builds Stake in Flowserve, Push for Changes
title_cn: Starboard 增持 Flowserve 股份，推动变革
summary: Activist investor Starboard Value has built a significant stake in Flowserve Corp. and is speaking to the industrial company about potential changes, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Stocks Hold Record in Countdown to Tech Earnings: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 科技股盈利倒计时创纪录：市场总结
summary: Stocks held at record highs before a raft of megacap earnings that will test whether April’s rally is sustainable, with traders also awaiting updates from major central banks on the economic fallout of the Iran war.

title: S&P, Nasdaq Continue Record Run | Closing Bell
title_cn: 标准普尔、纳斯达克继续创纪录运行 |结束钟声
summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Grupo Mexico to Merge Power Unit With BlackRock-Backed Saavi
title_cn: 墨西哥集团将与贝莱德支持的 Saavi 合并电力部门
summary: Mexican mining and railroad conglomerate Grupo Mexico has struck a deal to merge its electricity generation operations with a BlackRock Inc. unit, creating the country’s largest private power operator.

title: High Bar for Tech Earnings This Week: Covley
title_cn: 本周科技公司盈利的高标准：考夫利
summary: Manning & Napier Senior Investment Analyst Kelly Covley says there will be a high bar this week for tech companies to justify their level of AI capex spending. She speaks to Bloomberg's Matt Miller on 'Open Interest.' (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rogers Makes 10,000 Employees Eligible for Buyouts to Cut Costs
title_cn: 罗杰斯让 10,000 名员工有资格进行买断以削减成本
summary: Rogers Communications Inc., Canada’s largest wireless company, is making about 10,000 employees eligible for voluntary buyouts as the telecommunications industry deals with major growth and debt challenges.

title: A Warsh-Led Fed Stands to Reignite the Treasuries Steepener Bet
title_cn: 沃什领导的美联储将重新点燃国债赌注
summary: Wall Street strategists say that a Kevin Warsh-led Federal Reserve may jolt the $31 trillion Treasuries market out of its narrow trading ranges, urging investors to position for shorter-dated yields to eventually move lower.

title: Need For 'Clean Beta' with ETFs: F/M Investments CEO
title_cn: F/M Investments 首席执行官：ETF 需要“干净贝塔”
summary: Alex Morris, CEO & CIO of F/M Investments, joins Scarlet Fu and Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Banks to Join BMO-Led $1.8 Billion Debt Deal for Honeywell Spinoff
title_cn: 银行将加入 BMO 牵头的霍尼韦尔分拆 18 亿美元债务交易
summary: Bank of Montreal’s investment banking unit is leading a $1.8 billion debt deal supporting the sale of Honeywell International Inc.’s productivity solutions and services business to industrial manufacturer Brady Corp.

title: Shell’s ARC Deal Seen as Win for Mark Carney’s Pro-Oil Pivot
title_cn: 壳牌的 ARC 交易被视为马克·卡尼亲石油支点的胜利
summary: Shell Plc.’s acquisition of Canada’s ARC Resources Ltd. marks a vote of confidence in Prime Minister Mark Carney’s push to expand the nation’s hydrocarbon exports beyond the traditional US market, analysts say.

title: Walmart Plans to Sell Investment-Grade Bonds on Monday
title_cn: 沃尔玛计划周一出售投资级债券
summary: Walmart Inc. raised $4.25 billion from a high-grade bond offering, boosting the size of the deal amid a flood of issuance that was mostly well received.

title: Potential 'GRFT' ETF Outperforms S&P 500
title_cn: 潜在的“GRFT”ETF 跑赢标准普尔 500 指数
summary: Bloomberg Intelligence's Athanasios Psarofagis joins Scarlet Fu and Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg ETF IQ.". An ETF designed to track White House Policy has been in limbo for more than a year, as exchanges steer clear of what looks like a high-volatility, politically sensitive trade. The potential GRFT ETF is easily outperforming the S&P 500 this year. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Test Your ETF Knowledge In Our IQ Test
title_cn: 在我们的 IQ 测试中测试您的 ETF 知识
summary: Bloomberg's Scarlet Fu puts Katie Greifeld, Athanasios Psarofagis, and Vilana Hajric to the test on "Bloomberg ETF IQ" in this week's edition of "IQ Test." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Monroe's Koenig: AI Will Make Select Software Better
title_cn: Monroe 的 Koenig：人工智能将使精选软件变得更好
summary: "There's a lot less anxiety" in the private credit landscape says Monroe Capital Chairman & CEO Ted Koenig. He joined Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on "The Close" to discuss his outlook on private credit and the real but misdiagnosed AI risk. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Stocks, Nvidia Close at Record Highs Ahead of Tech Earnings
title_cn: 美国股市和英伟达在科技财报公布前收于历史新高
summary: US stocks eked out small gains on Monday to renew their record levels with Nvidia Corp. hitting a fresh high, as investors prepare for a swath of corporate earnings this week while monitoring developments in the Strait of Hormuz. A gauge of chip stocks finished lower after a historic run.

title: Match Invests $100 Million in Grindr Rival Sniffies With Option to Buy
title_cn: Match 投资 1 亿美元购买 Grindr Rival Sniffies，并可选择购买
summary: Match Group Inc., whose dating-app portfolio includes brands like Hinge, Tinder and Match.com, is investing $100 million in Sniffies, a platform for queer men, paving the way for a possible acquisition.

title: OpenAI Drops Exclusivity Deal with Microsoft | Bloomberg Tech 4/27/2026
title_cn: OpenAI 放弃与微软的独家协议 |彭博科技 2026 年 4 月 27 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow discusses Microsoft’s and OpenAI’s decision to drop exclusivity rights on AI models in a move that opens the doors for the rivals to make new deals. Plus, China blocks Meta's $2 billion purchase of AI startup Manus. And, the feud between Elon Musk and Sam Altman heads to court with the Tesla CEO alleging OpenAI abandoned its founding mission. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Joby Tests Air Taxis Between JFK Airport and Manhattan
title_cn: 乔比测试肯尼迪机场和曼哈顿之间的空中出租车
summary: Joby Aviation is flying electric air taxis between John F. Kennedy International Airport and Manhattan this week to show off its quieter, zero-emission aircraft in a city weary of noise pollution. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Joby Tests Air Taxis Between JFK Airport and Manhattan
title_cn: 乔比测试肯尼迪机场和曼哈顿之间的空中出租车
summary: Joby Aviation is flying electric air taxis between John F. Kennedy International Airport and Manhattan this week to show off its quieter, zero-emission aircraft in a city weary of noise pollution. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Big Job Cuts Come Ahead of Big Tech Earnings
title_cn: 科技巨头盈利之前大幅裁员
summary: Microsoft and Meta have announced plans that could reduce their workforces by thousands ahead of releasing their quarterly earnings later this week. Sarah Franklin, CEO of the human resources platform Lattice, says "Tokenmaxxing", AI use and large job cuts aren’t the right things to focus on to free up capital. She joins Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NBA’s Vegas, Seattle Push Gains Steam With Potential Bidders
title_cn: NBA 维加斯和西雅图竞标活动吸引了潜在竞标者
summary: The National Basketball Association has received signs of interest from multiple investor groups for new teams in Las Vegas and Seattle that the league plans to sell for as much as $10 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Musk, Altman Feud Heads to Court Over Future of OpenAI
title_cn: 马斯克与 Altman 因 OpenAI 未来不和告上法庭
summary: Jury selection begins in the legal battle between Elon Musk and Sam Altman over the corporate structure of OpenAI, in a case that could determine the company’s future. Dorothy Lund, professor of law at Columbia Law School specializing in corporate governance, joins Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Is Doubling Down on Tech Deals with the Gulf: Helberg
title_cn: 赫尔伯格：美国正在加倍加大与海湾地区的技术交易力度
summary: Under Secretary of State for Economic Affairs Jacob Helberg says the US is doubling down on partnerships with Gulf countries, and the conflict in the Middle East only highlights the need for international partnerships that shore up the tech supply chain. Helberg joins Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Xi Tests China’s Reach by Blocking Meta Deal That’s Already Done
title_cn: 习近平通过阻止已经完成的元交易来测试中国的影响力
summary: China has sought for years to exert influence over business deals beyond its home turf. Still, its decision to press Meta Platforms Inc. to unwind a $2 billion acquisition of AI startup Manus marks a step unlike anything it’s tried before.

title: Markets Are Ignoring Rising War Risks: Patterson
title_cn: 帕特森：市场忽视了不断上升的战争风险
summary: Markets are hitting all-time highs—but Rebecca Patterson, a former chief investment strategist at Bridgewater who's now a senior fellow at the Council on Foreign Relations. is warning that  investors may be ignoring serious geopolitical risks. From the ticking clock on oil supply disruptions to the fragile AI boom, she explains why today’s rally could face sudden reality checks if global tensions escalate or growth assumptions falter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Google’s AI Power Over Android Ecosystem Targeted by EU
title_cn: 欧盟瞄准谷歌人工智能对安卓生态系统的影响力
summary: Google was targeted by European Union watchdogs who unveiled a slate of proposals aimed at prising open its Android ecosystem to rivals’ AI services.

title: Hasbro ‘Magic: The Gathering’ Video Game Staff Try to Unionize
title_cn: 孩之宝《万智牌》视频游戏员工试图成立工会
summary: More than 100 employees at Hasbro Inc. who are involved in designing the video game rendition of the popular card game Magic: The Gathering are forming plans to unionize with the Communications Workers of America.

title: Apple, Google Crushed California Bill Helping Smaller Rivals
title_cn: 苹果、谷歌粉碎了加州法案，帮助规模较小的竞争对手
summary: Some of the world’s largest technology companies swiftly quashed a California legislative measure that pitted giants like Apple Inc. and Google against smaller rivals, a display of their immense political influence in their home state.

title: Google Staff Urge Pichai to Refuse Classified Military AI Work
title_cn: 谷歌员工敦促皮查伊拒绝机密军事人工智能工作
summary: Hundreds of AI researchers at Alphabet Inc.’s Google have signed onto a letter urging Chief Executive Officer Sundar Pichai to refuse to make the company’s artificial intelligence systems available for classified workloads for US defense missions, according to organizers of the effort.

title: Germany Suspects Russia Behind Cyberattack on Top Officials
title_cn: 德国怀疑俄罗斯是对高级官员进行网络攻击的幕后黑手
summary: Germany suspects Russia is behind a cyberattack that targeted top decision makers in Berlin via the Signal messaging app, according to a government official in Berlin.

title: Apple Store Union Workers at Closing Location Accuse Company of Retaliation
title_cn: 苹果商店关闭地点的工会工人指责公司进行报复
summary: Union representatives said Apple denied workers the ability to easily transfer to other locations, in a departure from its typical practice.

title: Verizon Reports Phone Subscriber Gains Under New CEO
title_cn: Verizon 报告称，在新任首席执行官的领导下，手机用户数量有所增加
summary: Verizon Communications Inc. surprised analysts Monday when it reported a gain of mobile subscribers, an early signal that new Chief Executive Officer Dan Schulman’s strategy for recapturing market share is already paying off.

title: Qualcomm May Be Working With OpenAI on a Phone, Analysts Says
title_cn: 分析师表示，高通可能会在手机上与 OpenAI 合作
summary: Qualcomm shares were on the rise Monday morning after an analyst suggested the chipmaker is working with artificial intelligence giant OpenAI on a smartphone. Ed Ludlow reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Polish TikTok Star Beats MrBeast in Record Cancer Care Campaign
title_cn: 波兰 TikTok 明星在创纪录的癌症护理活动中击败 MrBeast
summary: A Polish TikTok personality set a world record for a livestream charity campaign by raising at least 251 million zloty ($69 million) for a foundation helping children with cancer.

title: Sequoia and Nvidia Back Ex-DeepMind Researcher’s New AI Startup at $5.1 Billion Value
title_cn: 红杉资本和 Nvidia 以 51 亿美元的价格支持前 DeepMind 研究员的新人工智能初创公司
summary: Former Google DeepMind researcher David Silver has raised $1.1 billion for his new company, Ineffable Intelligence, in the latest example of an artificial intelligence startup securing enormous funds out of the gate.

title: Microsoft, OpenAI Sever Their Exclusive AI Pact
title_cn: 微软与 OpenAI 终止独家人工智能协议
summary: Microsoft and OpenAI have changed the terms of their deal when it comes to selling products. OpenAI can now pursue deals with cloud-computing rivals like Amazon. The revenue sharing agreement with Microsoft also changes. Ed Ludlow explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Private Credit Risks Are Misunderstood: Ketchum
title_cn: 私人信贷风险被误解：Ketchum
summary: Private credit isn’t cracking, it’s separating winners from losers according to Sound Point CEO Steve Ketchum. He joined Bloomberg Open Interest to argue that today’s stress comes from bad deals, not broken markets. He explains why his firm dodged software risk before AI disruption, and reveals why this shakeout could be a massive buying opportunity for disciplined investors. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Breaks Free From Exclusive AI Pact With Microsoft
title_cn: OpenAI 摆脱与微软的独家人工智能协议
summary: Microsoft Corp. and OpenAI have agreed to drop the software giant’s exclusive right to sell the startup’s AI models, opening the door for the ChatGPT maker to pursue deals with cloud-computing rivals like Amazon.com Inc.

title: What Happens When AIs Work Together?
title_cn: 当人工智能一起工作时会发生什么？
summary: On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, we are joined by METR's president Chris Painter and technical staff member Joel Becker. They tell Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway about the organization's focus on gauging an AI model's capability to do autonomous, complex tasks. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Blocks Meta’s $2 Billion Acquisition of AI Firm Manus
title_cn: 中国阻止 Meta 以 20 亿美元收购人工智能公司 Manus
summary: China has decided to block Meta Platforms Inc.’s $2 billion acquisition of agentic AI startup Manus, a surprise move to unwind a controversial deal that’s drawn fire for the leakage of technology to the US.

title: Qualcomm Gains on Report It’s Working With OpenAI on Phone
title_cn: 高通因在手机领域与 OpenAI 合作而获利
summary: Qualcomm Inc. shares jumped on Monday after a closely watched tech industry analyst suggested the chipmaker is working with artificial intelligence giant OpenAI on a smartphone.

title: Why China’s Affordable AI Is a Worry for Silicon Valley
title_cn: 为什么中国的人工智能负担得起，令硅谷担忧
summary: Chinese AI models are cheaper and more adaptable than the preeminent US platforms, and studies suggest they’re now almost as proficient. How did that happen?

title: Emerging Stocks an Even Better Bargain After Best Rally in Years
title_cn: 在经历了多年来的最佳反弹后，新兴股票变得更划算
summary: Emerging-market stocks are rallying three times as fast as US equities this year, and their lead may widen further if relative share valuations are any guide.

title: UK Should Have a Substantially Larger Fiscal Margin, Lords Say
title_cn: 上议院议员称英国应大幅提高财政利润
summary: UK governments must stop using their fiscal buffer as a “piggy bank” and toughen up the budget guidelines to help restore credibility with investors, according to a report by lawmakers in the House of Lords.

title: CBO Director Swagel on Calculating Federal Deficit
title_cn: 国会预算办公室主任斯瓦格尔谈联邦赤字计算
summary: CBO Director Phillip Swagel discusses how the long term fiscal outlook of the United States is looking and the adjustments the CBO has had to make to their ten year outlook following the US Supreme Court striking down on President Trump's global tariffs and the President launching a war with Iran. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Discusses Iran Proposal With Aides, White House Says
title_cn: 白宫称特朗普与助手讨论伊朗提议
summary: The White House said US officials were discussing Iran’s latest proposal but maintained “red lines” on any deal to end the eight-week war, including preventing Tehran from obtaining a nuclear weapon.

title: Press Dinner Shooting Sparks Fresh Secret Service Scrutiny
title_cn: 新闻晚宴枪击事件引发特勤局新一轮审查
summary: A gunman’s breach of a security checkpoint at a dinner attended by President Donald Trump is set to intensify pressure on lawmakers and the Secret Service to revisit proposed structural changes, even as Congress struggles to pass basic appropriations.

title: Rep. Downing on Iran Strikes, WHCD Security, FISA
title_cn: 众议员唐宁谈伊朗袭击、WHCD 安全、FISA
summary: Congressman Troy Downing (R-MT), a member of the House Financial Services Committee, says any decision to strike Iran should not be taken lightly but must be weighed against the threat of a nuclear-armed regime, adding the US may need to “see this through.” He also says the shooting at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner underscores the need for a more secure venue, arguing “we need to build that ballroom” to better protect the president and top officials. On Capitol Hill, Rep. Downing emphasizes the need to protect Fourth Amendment rights as lawmakers consider a FISA extension while ensuring intelligence tools remain in place to monitor foreign threats. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: WHCD Shooting Was a 'Near Miss': Security Expert
title_cn: WHCD 枪击事件“险些发生”：安全专家
summary: Donell Harvin, former DC Chief of Homeland Security and Intelligence and current faculty member at Georgetown University's School of Foreign Service, calls the shooting at Saturday's White House Correspondents' Dinner a "near miss," warning the president being within earshot of gunfire is "too close" and highlighting how "unprecedented" it is for one president to face three separate assassination attempts. He says the lack of a National Special Security Event designation and the concentration of top officials in one venue exposed vulnerabilities, even as he says the Secret Service response 'did exactly what it is supposed to do. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Welcomes King Charles at White House for State Visit
title_cn: 特朗普在白宫欢迎查尔斯国王进行国事访问
summary: US President Donald Trump welcomed King Charles III to the White House for a visit fraught with doubt about the future of Britain’s so-called special relationship with America and fresh security concerns in the wake of the shooting at the White House correspondents’ dinner. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Political Violence In Focus After White House Correspondents’ Shooting
title_cn: 白宫记者枪击事件后政治暴力成为焦点
summary: The White House will convene a meeting early this week to discuss safety measures for major events involving President Donald Trump, following Saturday’s shooting at the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner that spurred fresh scrutiny of security practices.  Frank Luntz, CEO of FIL Inc. joins Balance of Power to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sergey Brin Sparked a Political War to Influence California
title_cn: 谢尔盖·布林引发了一场影响加州的政治战争
summary:
Eliyahu Kamisher reports on the latest in the California's race for governor and Sergey Brin's role. It was late in the evening at a Christmas party hosted by crypto titan Chris Larsen — featuring singer Janelle Monáe and a towering abominable snowman with glowing red eyes — when Brin and his partner, Gerelyn Gilbert-Soto, confronted Newsom about a new proposal to tax billionaires in California, according to people who’ve spoken with the governor. Such a levy could hit Brin’s stake in Alphabet Inc. and his $272.6 billion fortune.
Newsom, who opposes the wealth tax, was still telling people about the lengthy exchange at the party months later, complaining of a lingering cold the pair had given him, according to the people, who asked not to be named discussing private conversations with the governor. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Russian Disinformation War's Most Potent Weapon Is Bending Realities
title_cn: 俄罗斯虚假信息战争最有力的武器正在扭曲现实
summary: Storm-1516 uses fabricated videos, phony websites and anonymous influencers to spread tales about election fraud, corruption and sexual abuse.

title: How Asia-Pacific Is Fighting a Fuel Shock That Could Get Worse
title_cn: 亚太地区如何应对可能变得更糟的燃油冲击
summary: Asian nations face the prospect of prolonged strain on crucial energy supplies as the conflict in the Middle East grinds past the two-month mark, with the Strait of Hormuz still largely off-limits to shipping.

title: How to Spot a Russian Deepfake
title_cn: 如何识别俄罗斯 Deepfake
summary: Russia-based groups have been found to be spreading disinformation for decades. Now a new one is capitalizing on AI to more effectively sow doubt and chaos. Bloomberg Investigates reports on Storm-1516. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gala Shooting Suspect Charged With Trying to Kill Trump
title_cn: 晚会枪击案嫌疑人被控试图刺杀特朗普
summary: A California man is being charged with trying to kill US President Donald Trump during an attack on a Washington gala dinner over the weekend.

title: King Charles Gets Trump’s Royal Treatment as He Looks to Mend Ties
title_cn: 查尔斯国王寻求修复关系，获得特朗普的皇室待遇
summary: The king’s state visit to the US is a chance to revive the US-UK relationship.

title: Trump Welcomes King Charles at White House for State Visit
title_cn: 特朗普在白宫欢迎查尔斯国王进行国事访问
summary: US President Donald Trump welcomed King Charles III to the White House for a visit fraught with doubt about the future of Britain’s so-called special relationship with America and fresh security concerns in the wake of the shooting at the White House correspondents’ dinner.

title: California Man Charged With Trying to Kill Trump at DC Dinner Saturday Night
title_cn: 加州男子被控试图在周六晚上的华盛顿晚宴上杀死特朗普
summary: A California man, Cole Tomas Allen, is being charged with trying to kill President Donald Trump during an attack Saturday night at the White House Correspondents’ Association annual dinner. Allen appeared in court Monday. Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche spoke at a press conference after the hearing. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: King Charles Lands in US, Iran Meets with Russia | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 4/27/2026
title_cn: 查尔斯国王登陆美国，伊朗会见俄罗斯 |彭博商业周刊日报 2026 年 4 月 27 日
summary: On today's episode of Bloomberg Businessweek Daily, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec discuss Iran's Foreign Minister's trip to Russia with Angela Stent, Senior Fellow at the American Enterprise Institute and author, 'Putin’s World: Russia Against the West and With the Rest.' They also discuss the spring investment outlook with Kristy Akullian, BlackRock Head of iShares Investment Strategy for the Americas. They also covered King Charles' arrival in the US for the first time as monarch. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran-Linked Oil Tankers Boarded by US Are Reversing Course
title_cn: 美国登上与伊朗有关的油轮正在改变航向
summary: Two Iran-linked oil tankers that US forces interdicted near Sri Lanka last week appear to have halted their westward course in the Indian Ocean and turned around.

title: Gala Shooting Suspect Charged With Trying to Kill Trump (DOJ Presser)
title_cn: 晚会枪击嫌疑人被控试图杀死特朗普（司法部新闻报道）
summary:
A California man is being charged with trying to kill US President Donald Trump during an attack on a Washington gala dinner over the weekend.
Cole Tomas Allen, 31, made his first appearance in federal court on Monday. He is also being charged with gun offenses. 
Wearing a blue jump suit and flanked by two public defenders, Allen appeared calm during the brief proceeding and will remain in custody for now. A detention hearing is set for later this week.  “We are investigating this matter fully,” said Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche during a press conference after the hearing. “We will apply the law fairly and we will ensure that accountably is swift and certain.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ecuador Dissolves Two Political Parties Ahead of Local Elections
title_cn: 厄瓜多尔在地方选举前解散两个政党
summary: Ecuador dissolved two opposition political parties ahead of local elections in November, a move critics decried as another sign of the South American country’s democratic backsliding under President Daniel Noboa.

title: King Charles Arrives in US for First State Visit as Monarch
title_cn: 查尔斯国王抵达美国开始作为君主的首次国事访问
summary: King Charles III and Queen Camilla arrived in the US Monday for a four-day trip on his first state visit to the US since becoming King in 2022. The visit is fraught with fresh security concerns in the wake of the shooting at the White House correspondents’ dinner. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: King Charles and Camilla Arrive in US for State Visit
title_cn: 查尔斯国王和卡米拉抵达美国进行国事访问
summary: King Charles III and Queen Camilla have arrived in the US for a four-day trip, his first state visit to the US since becoming King in 2022. They landed at Joint Base Andrews Monday afternoon. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Being ‘Humiliated’ in Iran Talks, Germany's Merz Says
title_cn: 德国默茨称特朗普在伊朗谈判中受到“羞辱”
summary: The US is being “humiliated” by Iranian leaders as President Trump struggles to negotiate an end to the war, German Chancellor Friedrich Merz said Monday (translation via AP). (Source: Bloomberg)

title: White House to Review Presidential Security After WHCA Attack
title_cn: 白宫将在 WHCA 袭击后审查总统安全
summary: The White House is reviewing security protocols for presidential events following Saturday’s shooting at the White House Correspondents’ Association Dinner, as officials weigh whether changes are needed to protect President Donald Trump.

title: Budget Airlines Ask US Government for $2.5 Billion in Relief
title_cn: 廉价航空公司向美国政府请求 25 亿美元救济
summary: Budget airlines are banding together to ask President Donald Trump’s administration for $2.5 billion to help combat increasing jet fuel prices in exchange for warrants that would give the US government the right to purchase equity stakes in the carriers, people familiar with the discussions said.

title: White House Assesses Security After Dinner Shooting | Balance of Power: Early Edition 4/27/2026
title_cn: 白宫在晚餐枪击事件后评估安全权力平衡：早期版本 2026 年 4 月 27 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power,  Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss security questions raised by a shooting attempt at the White House Correspondents Dinner and the implications of another instance of political violence against the backdrop of King Charles visit to the White House and the ongoing war with Iran. On today's show, Nonresident Senior Fellow at AEI Heather Conley, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino, Partner at Stonecourt Capital Rick Davis, and FIL CEO Frank Luntz. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Calls Kimmel Jokes ‘Despicable,’ Tells ABC to Fire Him
title_cn: 特朗普称金梅尔笑话“卑鄙”，并要求美国广播公司解雇他
summary: President Donald Trump called on Walt Disney Co.’s ABC to immediately fire late night host Jimmy Kimmel after what he called a “despicable call to violence” on an April 23 broadcast.

title: Trump Feels That Security Worked as Designed at Gala, Leavitt Says
title_cn: 莱维特表示，特朗普认为晚宴上的安保措施发挥了作用
summary: White House Press Secretary says President Donald Trump feels security worked as designed at the White House Correspondents' annual dinner on Saturday night. She spoke to reporters on Monday at the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran Foreign Minister Meets Putin As US Talks Stall
title_cn: 美国谈判陷入僵局，伊朗外长会见普京
summary:
Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi told President Vladimir Putin he’s committed to strengthening the country’s partnership with Russia, as talks with the US on ending an eight-week war remain at an impasse.
Araghchi said on a visit to Russia that the Iranian people are able to resist “US aggression and will be able to overcome it,” Iran state-owned Nour News said on Monday.  Angela Stent, Senior Fellow at the American Enterprise Institute and author, 'Putin’s World: Russia Against the West and With the Rest' joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)
